cards.jyutping: ng5 luk6 cat1
cards.english: Five, six, seven...

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: wan2 dou3 go3 dei6 fong1 nei1 maai4 laa3 wo3
cards.english: George has found a place to hide!

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngaam1 ngaam1 gong2 dak1 cit3

cards.jyutping: sap6 zeon2 bei6 hou2 mei6 aa3 ngo5 lai4 laa1

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jiu3 wan3 ceot1 nei1 maai4 hai2 bin1
cards.english: Peppa needs to find where George is hiding.

cards.jyutping: ngo5 wan2 dou3 nei5 laa3
cards.english: I found you!

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: wan2 dou3 laa3
cards.english: Peppa found George.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: George，我一眼就揾到你喺呢度喇
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jat1 ngaan5 zau6 wan2 dou3 nei5 hai2 ne1 dou6 laa3

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 leon4 dou3 nei1 maai4 laak3

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jat1 saam1
cards.english: One... three

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: dang2 ngo5 lai4 bong1 sou3 laa1
cards.english: Let me help George count.

cards.jyutping: jat1 ji6 saam1 sei3 ng5
cards.english: One, two, three, four, five.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: luk6 cat1 baat3 gau2 sap6
cards.english: Six, seven, eight, nine, ten.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 laa3 maak3 daai6 nei5 deoi3 ngaan5 laa1
cards.english: Okay, George, open your eyes wide now.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jiu3 wan2 ceot1 nei1 maai4 hai2 bin1
cards.english: George has to find where Peppa is hiding.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: m4 hai6 nei1 maai4 hai2 toi2 dai2 wo3
cards.english: Peppa isn't hiding under the table.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: George，你有冇諗過揾下樓上啊？
cards.jyutping: nei5 jau5 mou5 nam2 gwo3 wan2 haa6 lau4 soeng6 aa3
cards.english: George, have you thought about looking upstairs?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: m4 hai2 cong4 haa6 dai2 wo3

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 頭先嗰啲怪聲係咩嚟嘅呢？
cards.jyutping: tau4 sin1 go2 di1 gwaai3 sing1 hai6 me1 lai4 ge3 ne1
cards.english: What were those strange noises just now?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jik6 m4 hai2 coeng1 lim4 hau6 bin6 wo3
cards.english: Peppa's not behind the curtains either.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: di1 gwaai3 sing1 jau6 si3 ceot1 jin6 laa3
cards.english: Those strange noises are happening again.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hai6 di1 me1 sing1 lai4 ne1
cards.english: What are those noises?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: wan2 dou3 nei1 maai4 hai2 bin1 laa3
cards.english: George has found where Peppa is hiding.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: wan2 dou3 ngo5 laa3
cards.english: George found me!

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 dou3 de1 dei6 nei1 maai4 laa3
cards.english: Now it's Daddy's turn to hide.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo4 ngo5 gok3 dak1 jing1 goi1 dou3 zi3 ngaam1
cards.english: Oh, I think it should be George's turn.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 但係George根本唔識點匿埋喎
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 gan1 bun2 m4 sik1 dim2 nei1 maai4 wo3
cards.english: But George doesn't even know how to hide.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我肯定佢今次會好好多㗎喇
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hang2 ding6 keoi5 gam1 ci3 wui6 hou2 hou2 do1 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: I'm sure he will be much better this time.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 合埋眼先，然後開始數吖
cards.jyutping: hap6 maai4 ngaan5 sin1 jin4 hau6 hoi1 ci2 sou3 aa1
cards.english: Close your eyes first, and then start counting.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jat1 ji6
cards.english: One, two...

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: gam1 ci3 bai6 laa3
cards.english: Oh no, this is bad

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hou2 faai3 jau6 wui6 wan2 dou3 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: Peppa will find George quickly

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ng5 luk6
cards.english: Five, six...

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: gwo3 lai2 ni1 dou6 aa1
cards.english: George, come over here

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: baat3 gau2 sap6
cards.english: Eight, nine, ten

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: zeon2 bei6 hou2 mei6 aa3 ngo5 lai4 laa1
cards.english: Ready or not, here I come!

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: gam1 ci3 mou5 nei1 maai4 hai2 toi2 dai2 wo3
cards.english: George isn't hiding under the table this time

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 但係明明George次次都匿喺呢一度𠺝
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 ming4 ming4 ci3 ci3 dou1 nik1 hai2 ne1 jat1 dou6 gaak3
cards.english: But George always hides here

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 你有冇諗過揾下樓上啊？
cards.jyutping: nei5 jau5 mou5 nam2 gwo3 wan2 haa6 lau4 soeng6 aa3
cards.english: Have you thought about looking upstairs?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zi1 keoi5 hai2 bin1 laa3
cards.english: I know where he is!

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: hai2 wun6 geoi6 laam4 jap6 min6
cards.english: George is in the toy basket.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: m4 hai2 wun6 geoi6 laam4 jap6 bin6
cards.english: George isn't in the toy basket.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: keoi5 wui6 hai2 bin1 dou6 ne1
cards.english: Where could he be?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: wan3 gik6 dou1 wan2 m4 dou3 wo3
cards.english: Peppa can't find George no matter how hard she looks.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 爹哋，我揾極都揾唔到George啊
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 ngo5 wan2 gik6 dou1 wan2 m4 dou3 aa3
cards.english: Daddy, I can't find George no matter how hard I look.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 真係呀？噉佢會匿喺邊度呢？
cards.jyutping: zan1 hai6 aa1 gam2 keoi5 wui6 nik1 hai2 bin1 dou6 ne1
cards.english: Really? Then where could he be hiding?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我諗呢，呢份報紙 可能同George有啲關係啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 nam2 ne1 ne1 fan6 bou3 zi2 ho2 nang4 tung4 jau5 di1 gwaan1 hai6 aa3
cards.english: I think this newspaper might have something to do with George.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ngo5 wan2 dou3 nei5 laa3
cards.english: George, I found you!

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: ai1 jaa3
cards.english: Oh, George.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 你匿埋喺呢一度真係好聰明啊
cards.jyutping: nei5 nei1 maai4 hai2 ne1 jat1 dou6 zan1 hai6 hou2 cung1 ming4 aa3
cards.english: You're really clever to hide here.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E5 Hide and Seek［捉迷藏］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 原來George一直匿埋喺 豬先生份報紙裏面啊
cards.jyutping: jyun4 loi4 jat1 zik6 nei1 maai4 hai2 zyu1 sin1 saang1 fan6 bou3 zi2 leoi5 min6 aa3
cards.english: So it turns out George was hiding in Mr. Pig's newspaper all along.
